description: You are managing the Urban Electronics Drupal Commerce store (http://localhost, admin/Admin1234!). Configure a new enabled seasonal promotion named 'Spring Clearance 30% Off' with the display name '30% Off Spring Clearance' for the 'Urban Electronics' store. The promotion must provide a 30% discount on the order subtotal for orders of $150 or more and require the coupon code 'SPRING30' with a usage limit of 50.
